creator: ras
description: Mumia Abu Jamal has been a victim of the US prison gulag system for over two decades. During this time, he has been held on death row and censored in solitary confinement. He is one of a now growing body of political prisoners and prisoners of war held in the Amerikan Gulag system, exemplified by Guantanamo. Yet his still small voice continues to quake fear in his oppressors and encouragement to ordinary every day people living in the jurisdiction of the amerikan empire. As nelson mandela, huey newton, geronimo pratt he continues the struggle from within the belly of the beast. In this movie, mumia's word are integrated into a panoramic video montage to permit his voice from within the belly of the beast to be once again heard in optical context. Free Mumia! Free the Cuba 5! Free all Guantanamo detainees! Free all political prisoners and prisoners held in the amerikan gulag! Free the Land! Patria o Muerte! A Luta Continua!
